intended_use_full: qp-Prostate is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including radiologists specialized in prostate imaging, urologists and oncologists. The software runs on a standard "off-the-shelf" workstation and can be used to perform image viewing, processing and analysis of prostate MR images. Data and images are acquired through DICOM compliant imaging devices and modalities. Patient management decisions should not be based solely on the results of qp-Prostate. qp-Prostate does not perform a diagnostic function, but instead allows the users to visualize and analyze DICOM data.
ground_truth: QIBA Digital Reference Objects (DROs) for DWI and DCE; comparison to predicate device (OLEA Sphere v3.0, K152602) using clinical prostate MR cases
other_metrics: Bench testing included Digital Reference Object (DRO) analysis for Diffusion-ADC and Perfusion-Pharmacokinetics modules; clinical algorithm performance testing on Motion Correction, Registration, Spatial Smoothing, AIF selection, and Prostate Segmentation algorithms; comparison to predicate device (OLEA Sphere v3.0) showed qp-Prostate functions as intended and is as safe and effective as predicate device without raising new safety/efficacy questions
